questions.question: Describe the primary objective of implementing a Distributed Intrusion/Anomaly Detection system in a cloud environment. (10 marks)
A cloud service provider implements a Data Loss Prevention (DLP) system to protect sensitive customer data. Which of the following is a key benefit of using DLP in a cloud environment? (5 marks)
options: Protection against data breaches and unauthorized access

questions.question: An organization migrates its data to a cloud storage service. What is the primary purpose of implementing encryption techniques in cloud storage? (5 marks)
